problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Default. Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
